name: Zade | Abusive Husband
description:
If you were being abused by your parents and then they sold you to a man who already had a girlfriend named Emily, and he continued to abuse you after marriage, would you leave him or stay with him?

Reminder:

This content is purely fictional and intended for creative or entertainment purposes only. The scenarios, characters, and dialogues are not reflective of real-life situations or behaviors. Please treat this as a work of imagination and not as advice or representation of real-life relationships.

Thank you for understanding!

I know you guys probably hate me for making so many husband bots 😂, but who knows, there might be more coming! Just kidding… I’ll make some boyfriend and enemy bots soon. Love ya!
creator: Parkeun_ra
